strengths: Correctly identified the trigger condition to extend (`NEW."title" <> OLD."title"`)
Proposed adding `title = NEW."title"` to both video and post UPDATE paths, preserving existing logic
Created a new migration file rather than modifying the old one, which follows TypeORM migration conventions

Test proposal follows existing patterns in the test file
judge.summary: The agent identified the correct trigger extension pattern and proposed reasonable SQL changes, but the git diff is empty—meaning no code was actually committed to the repository despite tool counts showing an edit and a write. Additionally, the ground truth requires touching `src/notifications/builder.ts`, which the agent never addressed. Tests were not executed (tests: null), so the proposed test was never validated. The result is essentially a plan rather than a working implementation.
weaknesses: Git diff is empty—no actual code changes were persisted in the repository
Never touched `src/notifications/builder.ts`, a required file per the ground truth
Tests were never executed (tests: null), so the regression test is unverified
The proposed test references fixture values (e.g., `title: 'P1'`, `image: 'https://daily.dev/image.jpg'`) that may not match actual fixtures—never validated
Missing `await` on `queryRunner.query()` calls in the migration, which could cause race conditions

notes: Good fit for convention-following implementation tasks.

acceptance_criteria: Refreshes notification attachment titles when the underlying post title changes.
Preserves the current type and image refresh behavior.
Adds a focused regression test for the title-change path.
Avoids unrelated notification or post-update refactors.
task.ground_truth:
Expected outcome:
- The implementation should extend the existing post-update to notification-attachment flow so title changes update stored notification attachment data alongside the current image/type updates. It should add a regression test for the title-change case.

Must mention / touch:
- src/migration/1702914653781-NotificationAttachmentTrigger.ts
- src/notifications/builder.ts
- __tests__/triggers/notifications.ts

Common failure modes:
- Replacing the current image/type update logic instead of extending it
- Skipping regression coverage for title changes
